Description: Delivery truck reversed without spotter near pedestrian walkway
Immediate_Action: Stopped work - established traffic management plan
Root_Cause: No traffic management plan in place
Corrective_Action: Implemented mandatory spotter protocol for all vehicle movements

Description: Worker struck by falling rock during excavation face trimming
Immediate_Action: First aid administered - worker sent to hospital
Root_Cause: Unstable rock face not adequately assessed
Corrective_Action: Installed rock bolts and mesh. Added geotechnical review before each excavation shift

Description: Shoring strut showed excessive deflection during monitoring
Immediate_Action: Evacuated zone - engineer inspection
Root_Cause: Settlement exceeding predictions due to adjacent water main
Corrective_Action: Added supplementary bracing. Increased monitoring frequency to hourly

Description: Sediment-laden discharge detected in stormwater outfall
Immediate_Action: Shut down dewatering. Installed emergency sediment bags
Root_Cause: Filter system overwhelmed by overnight rainfall
Corrective_Action: Upgraded filtration capacity. Added turbidity monitoring at outfall

Description: Noise levels exceeded 85 dBA during rock socket drilling without adequate monitoring
Immediate_Action: Distributed hearing protection. Established noise monitoring
Root_Cause: Drill rig louder than anticipated in rock conditions
Corrective_Action: Mandatory audiometric testing. Continuous noise monitoring posted at 3 locations

Description: Worker slipped on wet concrete splatter near pump hose connection
Immediate_Action: First aid - minor knee abrasion
Root_Cause: Housekeeping not maintained around pump area
Corrective_Action: Assigned dedicated housekeeping crew during all concrete pours

Description: Rebar worker reported lower back strain from prolonged bending
Immediate_Action: Rotated worker to lighter duties
Root_Cause: Repetitive bending without ergonomic aids
Corrective_Action: Provided rebar tying guns. Implemented mandatory rotation every 2 hours

Description: Waterproofing crew exposed to solvent fumes in confined parkade area
Immediate_Action: Ventilation fans deployed. Crew moved to fresh air
Root_Cause: Inadequate ventilation for solvent-based membrane application
Corrective_Action: Switched to water-based membrane system. Added continuous air monitoring

Description: Worker fell 2.5m from formwork platform - safety harness lanyard not connected
Immediate_Action: Emergency response activated. Worker hospitalized with fractured wrist and ribs
Root_Cause: Worker detached lanyard to move between platforms. No intermediate anchor points
Corrective_Action: Installed retractable SRL system on all formwork platforms. Full safety stand-down and retraining for all crews

Description: Formwork panel nearly dropped during crane lift - rigging sling showed wear
Immediate_Action: Stopped lift. Replaced sling. Inspected all rigging
Root_Cause: Worn sling not caught in pre-shift inspection
Corrective_Action: Implemented colour-coded monthly sling inspection tags. Added rigging-specific toolbox talk

Description: Concrete vibrator dropped from floor 5 edge - struck scaffold netting below
Immediate_Action: Secured perimeter. Inspected netting - held but damaged
Root_Cause: No tool tethering in place at slab edge
Corrective_Action: Mandatory tool tethering for all work above 3rd floor. Replaced scaffold netting

Description: Two workers showed signs of heat exhaustion during afternoon concrete pour
Immediate_Action: Moved to shade. Provided water and electrolytes. Monitored for 1 hour
Root_Cause: Heatwave conditions - no adjusted work schedule
Corrective_Action: Implemented heat stress protocol: modified hours when humidex >35. Cooling stations on every 3rd floor

Description: PT strand whipped during stressing operation - struck worker on forearm
Immediate_Action: First aid. X-ray confirmed no fracture - deep tissue bruise
Root_Cause: Exclusion zone not maintained during stressing
Corrective_Action: Expanded exclusion zone to 5m radius. Added physical barriers during stressing operations

Description: High wind gust displaced unsecured scaffold plank on floor 7 perimeter
Immediate_Action: Secured all planks. Suspended scaffold work for remainder of day
Root_Cause: Wind speed exceeded safe working threshold - no anemometer on site
Corrective_Action: Installed anemometers at ground and every 10th floor. Automatic work suspension at 40 km/h

Description: Temporary power cable damaged by concrete bucket - minor arc flash
Immediate_Action: De-energized circuit. Isolated damaged cable
Root_Cause: Cable routing conflicted with concrete placement zone
Corrective_Action: Rerouted all temporary power cables away from pour zones. Added GFCI protection on all temp circuits

Description: Crane load exceeded 85% capacity during core wall panel lift in wind
Immediate_Action: Aborted lift. Waited for wind to subside
Root_Cause: Lift plan did not account for wind loading on large panel
Corrective_Action: Updated lift planning to include real-time wind factor calculations. Added wind speed check 15 min before each critical lift

Description: Curtain wall installer's scaffold bracket failed - worker caught by safety line and suspended
Immediate_Action: Rescue team deployed. Worker recovered uninjured but shaken
Root_Cause: Bracket fatigue - not detected in inspection
Corrective_Action: All brackets load-tested before each shift. Added redundant safety cable independent of scaffold system

Description: Plumber cut hand on sharp sheet metal duct edge while routing pipe adjacent to ductwork
Immediate_Action: First aid - 4 stitches at clinic
Root_Cause: No cut-resistant gloves. Sharp duct edges not capped
Corrective_Action: Mandatory cut-resistant gloves for all trades working near sheet metal. Duct installers must cap edges same day

Description: Concrete pump line blockage caused pressure spike - hose coupling shifted
Immediate_Action: Shut down pump. Bled pressure. Inspected all couplings
Root_Cause: Pump operator continued pumping when flow stopped instead of shutting down
Corrective_Action: Retrained all pump operators on blockage protocol. Added pressure relief valves at every 5th coupling

Description: Curtain wall gasket strip fell from floor 12 - landed in hoarded pedestrian zone below
Immediate_Action: Inspected hoarding - intact. No injuries. Recovered gasket
Root_Cause: Gasket not secured during panel alignment
Corrective_Action: All loose materials must be tethered or contained during facade work. Extended hoarding by 2m

Description: Roofer slipped on frost-covered membrane during morning application
Immediate_Action: First aid - bruised hip. No fall from height
Root_Cause: Frost not cleared before work started
Corrective_Action: Morning frost inspection required before roof work. Non-slip mats on access paths

Description: Sprinkler pipe coupling failed pressure test - joint separated and sprayed water on floor 8
Immediate_Action: Shut down test. Mopped floor. Re-made joint
Root_Cause: Improper joint preparation - flux contamination
Corrective_Action: Added independent QC inspection for all sprinkler joints before testing. Material storage protocol updated

Description: Drywall dust levels exceeded OEL during sanding on floor 3 - 4 workers exposed
Immediate_Action: Stopped sanding. Issued P100 respirators. Ventilated area
Root_Cause: General-use dust masks used instead of rated respirators. No dust extraction
Corrective_Action: Mandatory P100 respirators for all sanding. Vacuum-attached sanding equipment required

Description: Elevator installer's hand caught between guide rail and bracket during alignment
Immediate_Action: Freed hand. First aid - two fingers lacerated and bruised
Root_Cause: Pinch point not identified in task hazard analysis
Corrective_Action: Updated elevator install THA to include all pinch points. Mandatory two-person operation for rail alignment

Description: Wind caused unsecured curtain wall panel to swing during crane placement
Immediate_Action: Aborted placement. Secured panel. Stood down for 2 hours
Root_Cause: Wind speed borderline - crew proceeded without updated check
Corrective_Action: Zero tolerance: wind check within 10 min of every glazing lift. No exceptions

Description: Tile installer tripped over unsecured power cable in lobby area
Immediate_Action: Minor stumble - no injury
Root_Cause: Cable not routed through designated cable trays
Corrective_Action: All temporary cables in finished areas must use overhead or designated floor routing

Description: BAS technician received minor shock from miswired junction box on floor 10
Immediate_Action: De-energized. Assessed - no burns. Monitored for 4 hours
Root_Cause: Incorrectly labelled circuit from previous rough-in phase
Corrective_Action: Mandatory lockout/tagout verification with multimeter before any BAS connection. Circuit labelling audit for all floors
